Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

The patch is fine, but it would be useful to add tests for the previous patches.  It might be better if this was added incrementally with each patch, but I'm OK to add it in this patch to ensure this whole series of patches is actually working properly (which I'd imagine you have done manually), but more importantly continues to work in the future when other changes are landed.

> Matthew, as discussed in #28299, do you think you would have time
 > to contribute functionality tests for the Lustre Audit feature?

 > overhead incurred by a completely separate test script).

parents.subject: LU-9727 lustre: record denied OPEN in Changelogs

commit.subject: LU-9727 utils: make llog_reader decode changelog fields
commit.message:
LU-9727 utils: make llog_reader decode changelog fields

Make llog_reader decode all Changelogs fields and extra fields.

Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Idfb41607fc5664cb99b254aece4625d1796331af
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/30315
Reviewed-by: Li Xi <lixi@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
